name: Gourmet Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sliced mushrooms (fresh, or canned, drained)
recipeInstructions:
- For the filling, lightly brown mushrooms and onion in butter in a medium-sized skillet. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream.
- For the meat loaf, combine all ingredients thoroughly: 1 1/2 lb Ground beef, 3/4 cup Quaker Oats (uncooked - quick or old-fashioned), 1 Egg, 2 ts Salt, 1/4 ts Pepper, 1 ts Worcestershire sauce, and 2/3 c Milk.
- Place half of the meat mixture in a shallow baking pan to form an oval base. Make a shallow "well" for the filling along the center lengthwise.
- Spoon the filling into the "well". Shape the remaining meat mixture over the filling, ensuring all is covered.
- Seal the bottom and top meat mixtures together. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 1 hour. Let stand 5 minutes before slicing.
